---
title: "Womankind. By Charlotte Mary Yonge."
---

## Womankind. By Charlotte Mary Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1876
**Genre:** Non-fiction: advice book
**Format:** Book 327pp

**Publisher:** London: Mozley and Smith, 6 Paternoster Row.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
